name: v0.3.0-beta
body:
## What's Changed
* feat: recipe cards, per-recipe notes with iCloud sync, and nav fixes by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/7
* feat: recipe library sorting and macOS 26 crash fix by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/8
* feat: My Sim Dial + recipe library polish by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/9
* feat: shooting info metadata + sync cache fix by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/10
* docs: NAS EXIF cache spec by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/11
* feat: viewer improvements — grid/list browser, nav fixes, and display polish by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/12
* Recipe UI polish: shared card, right rail, persisted state by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/13
* feat: live folder watching, export polish, and Reveal in Finder by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/14
* feat: export polish — dark mode, success feedback, and cleaner card renders by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/pull/15


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ebrock/InkFrame/compare/v0.2.0-beta...v0.3.0-beta
